description: Implement Stripe subscription billing for SEIDO with per-lot pricing (5€ HT/lot/month or 50€ HT/lot/year), 30-day app-managed trial without credit card, annual-aggressive pricing push, zero-friction upgrades, read-only mode on expiry, and coupon system via Stripe Dashboard.
corrections: C1: Table subscriptions = CREATE TABLE (pas ALTER — table n'existe pas encore)
C2: Admin client = getSupabaseAdmin() dans lib/services/core/supabase-admin.ts
C3: Email templates dans emails/templates/ (pas lib/email/templates/)
C4: Billing access = role admin dans team_members uniquement
C5: Coupons = pourcentage uniquement, duree flexible, Stripe Dashboard
C6: Read-only impacte locataires/prestataires avec message clair
C7: Double page billing : resume parametres + page dediee /gestionnaire/abonnement
C8: Notification suppression lot + lien Portal (pas de reduction auto)
C9: TVA = HT (prix affiches hors taxes)
C10: Trial demarre a la creation team (signup gestionnaire)
C11: Beta users : trial 30j a partir du deploiement Stripe

userStories.title: Installation packages Stripe
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Stripe SDK installed and configured so that I can interact with Stripe API from the SEIDO codebase.

userStories.title: Migration DB — Schema Stripe complet
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all Stripe-related database tables and functions created so that the subscription system has its data layer ready.
acceptanceCriteria: Enum subscription_status cree (trialing, active, past_due, canceled, incomplete, free_tier, read_only, unpaid)
RLS policies: SELECT pour role admin sur subscriptions, stripe_customers, stripe_invoices
userStories.notes: CORRECTION C1: CREATE TABLE pas ALTER TABLE. CORRECTION C4: role admin uniquement pour RLS.

userStories.title: Migration donnees beta users
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want existing beta users to receive a 30-day trial from Stripe deployment date so that they have time to evaluate the paid offering.
acceptanceCriteria: Script migration cree record subscriptions pour chaque team existante
Stripe Customer cree pour chaque team
userStories.notes: CORRECTION C11: Beta users trial 30j a partir du deploiement.

userStories.title: Repository Subscription
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a SubscriptionRepository following the SEIDO Repository Pattern so that subscription data access is centralized and type-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Methodes: findByTeamId, findByStripeSubscriptionId, create, update, updateByTeamId, upsertByTeamId, getLotCount

userStories.title: Repository Stripe Customer
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a StripeCustomerRepository so that Stripe customer mapping is managed via the repository pattern.

userStories.title: SubscriptionService — Core
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a complete SubscriptionService with all business logic so that subscription state management is centralized.
acceptanceCriteria: 10 methodes: getSubscriptionInfo, canAddProperty, hasPaymentMethod, getOrCreateStripeCustomer, createCheckoutSession, upgradeSubscriptionDirect, previewUpgrade, createPortalSession, initializeTrialSubscription, isReadOnlyMode

userStories.title: Webhook API Route
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Stripe webhook handler at /api/stripe/webhook so that all Stripe events are securely processed and synced to our DB.

userStories.title: Server Actions Subscription
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire admin, I want server actions to manage my team's subscription so that I can check status, upgrade, and manage billing from the app.
acceptanceCriteria: 9 actions: getSubscriptionStatus, checkCanAddProperty, checkHasPaymentMethod, isReadOnlyMode, createCheckoutSessionAction, upgradeSubscriptionDirect, getUpgradePreview, verifyCheckoutSession, createPortalSessionAction

userStories.title: Integration trial dans le signup flow
userStories.description: As a nouveau gestionnaire, I want my 30-day trial to start automatically when I create my team so that I can use all features without payment info.
acceptanceCriteria: Apres creation team dans callback auth, appel initializeTrialSubscription()
userStories.notes: CORRECTION C10: Trial demarre a la creation team.

userStories.title: Page dediee Abonnement
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire admin, I want a dedicated billing page showing my subscription details so that I can see my plan, usage, invoices, and manage my subscription.
acceptanceCriteria: Affiche: statut, plan, lots utilises/abonnes, prochaine facture, date renouvellement
Bouton Gerer mon abonnement → Stripe Portal
Bouton Mettre a niveau si upgrade possible

userStories.title: Resume abonnement dans Parametres
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire admin, I want a subscription summary card in settings so that I can quickly see my plan status.
acceptanceCriteria: Affiche: statut, plan, lots, jours restants trial
Si trial: compte a rebours + CTA annuel
Si read-only: banner rouge + CTA reactivation

userStories.title: Trial Banner
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire en trial, I want to see a banner showing my trial progress so that I know when it ends and can subscribe.
acceptanceCriteria: Affiche les 7 derniers jours du trial

userStories.title: Read-Only Banner
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire dont l'essai a expire, I want a permanent banner explaining my read-only status so that I know how to regain access.
acceptanceCriteria: Locataire/prestataire: message adapte (demandes indisponibles, contacter gestionnaire)
userStories.notes: CORRECTION C6: Message clair pour locataires/prestataires.

userStories.title: Upgrade Modal (double mode)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire atteignant sa limite de lots, I want an upgrade modal that adapts to whether I have a saved card for minimal friction.
acceptanceCriteria: Mode A (CB sauvee): confirmation inline, 1 clic upgradeSubscriptionDirect()
Mode B (pas CB): PricingCard annuel pre-selectionne, Checkout redirect

userStories.title: Pricing Card (annual-aggressive)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire potentiel, I want pricing that highlights annual savings so that I'm incentivized to choose annual.
acceptanceCriteria: Annuel: carte highlight, badge Recommande Economisez 17%, prix barre, CTA primaire
Prix affiches HT + mention TVA applicable
Calcul dynamique total = nb_lots x prix

userStories.title: Contextual Upgrade Prompt
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire bloque par une limite, I want a contextual message explaining why and how to upgrade.
acceptanceCriteria: Icone, message, CTA specifique par contexte

userStories.title: Value Calculator
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire en trial, I want to see how much time and money SEIDO saved me so that I feel the value.
acceptanceCriteria: Affiche: heures economisees, equivalent monetaire, nb interventions
Utilisable dans page abonnement et emails

userStories.title: Hook useSubscription
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a client-side hook for subscription state so that any component can check status reactively.
acceptanceCriteria: Expose: status, loading, refresh(), canAddProperty(), hasPaymentMethod()

userStories.title: Integration limite lots dans formulaires
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want lot creation forms to check my subscription limit so that I'm prompted to upgrade if needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Formulaire creation lot: check canAddProperty() avant submit

userStories.title: Enforcement read-only cross-app
userStories.description: As a developer, I want read-only mode enforced across the entire app for all roles.
acceptanceCriteria: Locataire: message demandes indisponibles quand team gestionnaire read-only
Prestataire: interventions en cours continuent, pas de nouvelles assignations
userStories.notes: CORRECTION C6: Read-only impacte tous les roles.

userStories.title: Notification suppression lot → lien Portal
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire qui supprime un lot, I want to be notified I'm still paying for the old quantity.
acceptanceCriteria: Apres suppression lot, si subscribed_lots > actual_lots: toast + bouton Portal

userStories.title: Flow Checkout success + verification
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire qui vient de payer, I want payment verified server-side before seeing success.
acceptanceCriteria: Verifie payment_status paid ET team_id correspond
Si non verifie: message verification en cours + polling
Navigation manuelle sans session_id: pas de message succes

userStories.title: CRON — Notifications trial (J-7, J-3, J-1)
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want automated emails sent before trial expiry to remind users to subscribe.
acceptanceCriteria: J-1: email critique avec stats + CTA annuel

userStories.title: CRON — Expiration trial
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want expired trials automatically transitioned to read-only or free tier.

userStories.title: Email templates billing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all billing email templates created so that CRON jobs and events can send formatted emails.
acceptanceCriteria: Templates dans emails/templates/billing/: welcome, trial-ending, trial-expired, win-back, payment-failed, subscription-activated

userStories.title: CRON — Behavioral triggers
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want usage-based conversion emails for engaged trial users.
acceptanceCriteria: Triggers: >= 3 lots, >= 1 intervention cloturee, >= 1 team member

userStories.title: CRON — Cleanup webhook events
userStories.description: As a developer, I want old webhook events cleaned up automatically.

userStories.title: Configuration Vercel CRON
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all CRON jobs registered in vercel.json.
acceptanceCriteria: vercel.json mis a jour avec 4 nouveaux crons

userStories.title: Documentation coupons Stripe + configuration
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want a clear coupon strategy documented and configured in Stripe Dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation dans docs/stripe/: types, regles, bonnes pratiques
Coupons: EARLY2026 (100% off 3 mois), REFERRAL (100% off 1 mois), ANNUAL20 (20% off forever)
userStories.notes: CORRECTION C5: Coupons pourcentage uniquement, duree flexible.

userStories.title: Flow reactivation (read-only → paid)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire dont l'abonnement a expire, I want to reactivate easily to regain access.
acceptanceCriteria: Banner read-only avec Reactiver mon abonnement CTA

userStories.title: Admin — Extension trial
userStories.description: As an admin SEIDO, I want to extend a team's trial period.
acceptanceCriteria: Script SQL: UPDATE subscriptions SET trial_end = trial_end + INTERVAL X days
Peut etre execute via Supabase SQL Editor

userStories.title: Configuration Stripe Dashboard production
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Stripe Dashboard fully configured for production.
acceptanceCriteria: Produit SEIDO Subscription avec 2 prix (annuel 50€ HT, mensuel 5€ HT)
Webhook endpoint configure avec tous les events
Stripe Tax Belgium 21% VAT exclusive automatic

userStories.title: Tests end-to-end (Stripe test mode)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all subscription flows tested with Stripe test cards.
acceptanceCriteria: 14 test cases passes (signup, trial, expiry, checkout, upgrade, cancel, payment failed, reactivation, webhook idempotency, code promo)
Stripe CLI pour tester webhooks localement
userStories.notes: Depends on all previous stories being implemented.

userStories.title: Social proof dans trial banner
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire en trial, I want to see how many other managers use SEIDO.
acceptanceCriteria: Compteur: Rejoint par X+ gestionnaires ce mois

userStories.title: Onboarding checklist gamifie
userStories.description: As a nouveau gestionnaire en trial, I want a progress checklist guiding me through features.
acceptanceCriteria: Checklist: creer lot, intervention, inviter prestataire, uploader document, cloturer intervention

userStories.title: Strategic in-app notifications
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want upgrade prompts at positive moments (milestones).
acceptanceCriteria: CTA uniquement derniers 7 jours trial ou a la limite
